calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Stephen Weber, Appellant/Defendant

Scott A. Gursky, Esq., for Respondents/Plaintiffs Christopher David Hardaway and Lionel Brazil, who are also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Stephen Weber, Appellant/Defendant testifies on his own behalf.

Mr. Gursky argues to the Court on behalf of Christopher David Hardaway and Lionel Brazil, Respondents/Plaintiffs.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Robert Stumpf, Clerk Danial Lemire, not reported (525)
